title: Day Trip to Krka from Vodice | Private Transfer, Fixed €125 | TAXI Antonio
description: Private round-trip taxi transfer to Krka from Vodice. Fixed €125 per car, up to 4 passengers, door-to-door from Vodice, Srima and Tribunj hotels and apartments. Not a tour, just the ride there and back.
keywords: day trip to krka from vodice, krka from vodice, taxi to krka from vodice, krka transfer vodice, krka from srima, krka from tribunj, vodice to krka national park

schema.name: Private Day Trip to Krka from Vodice
schema.description: A private day trip to Krka National Park from Vodice with a local English-speaking driver. Fixed price of 125 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, with door-to-door pickup at hotels and apartments in Vodice, Srima and Tribunj.

offers.description: Private vehicle, round trip Vodice to Krka National Park, up to 4 passengers. Park entrance tickets not included.

mainEntity.name: Is this a guided tour or a taxi transfer?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is a taxi transfer, not a guided tour. Antonio is a local driver providing a private round-trip transfer from Vodice to Krka and back. You get the car and the driving; inside the park you are free to explore on your own, at your own pace.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from Srima and Tribunj as well as Vodice?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Pickup from Srima and Tribunj is at the same fixed price as Vodice. I collect you door to door from any hotel, apartment or villa in Vodice, Srima or Tribunj, including the Vodice marina and Riva.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi to Krka from Vodice?

acceptedAnswer.text: A private round-trip transfer from Vodice to Krka Lakes is a fixed 125 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, with fuel and the waiting time at the park included. The same price covers pickups in Srima and Tribunj.

mainEntity.name: How long do we spend at Krka National Park?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most guests choose around 3 to 4 hours of free time inside the park, enough to see the main waterfalls and walk the classic boardwalk loop. A shorter or longer stay can be agreed when you book.

mainEntity.name: Are Krka entrance tickets included in the price?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Entrance tickets are bought separately, directly from Krka National Park at the Skradin or Lozovac entrance or online. Tickets cost roughly 7 to 40 euros depending on the season.

mainEntity.name: How do I book and pay for the day trip from Vodice to Krka?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros) confirms the booking, by bank transfer or card, and you get an invoice as confirmation. The balance is paid to the driver on the day, in cash or by card.
